name: FabioOS - SPEC para Plano de Execucao

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
const plan = {
  request_id: item.request_id,
  title: item.title,
  domain: item.domain,
  phase: item.phase,
  excellence_gate: item.excellence_gate,
  permission: item.permission,
  complexity: item.complexity,
  tasks: item.tasks,
  quality_gates: item.quality_gates,
  acceptance: item.acceptance,
  tests: item.tests,
  recommended_next_step: item.excellence_gate === 'pass' ? 'aprovar plano e distribuir tarefas por zona' : 'refinar SPEC antes de implementar',
  external_effects: false
};
const markdown = [
  `# Plano de Execucao - ${item.title}`,
  '',
  `- Dominio: ${item.domain}`,
  `- Fase: ${item.phase || 'nao definida'}`,
  `- Gate de excelencia: ${item.excellence_gate}`,
  `- Permissao: ${item.permission}`,
  `- Complexidade: ${item.complexity}`,
  '',
  '## Tarefas',
  ...item.tasks.map(t => `- [ ] ${t.id} (${t.owner}/${t.zone}): ${t.task}`),
  '',
  '## Gates de qualidade',
  ...item.quality_gates.map(g => `- ${g}`),
  '',
  '## Criterios de aceite',
  ...item.acceptance.map(a => `- [ ] ${a}`),
  '',
  '## Testes minimos',
  ...item.tests.map(t => `- [ ] ${t}`),
  ''
].join('\n');
return [{ json: {...item, execution_plan: plan, markdown_plan: markdown, status: 'plan_ready'} }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.excellence_gate, request_id: $json.request_id, title: $json.title, permission: $json.permission, complexity: $json.complexity, missing_sections: $json.missing_sections, execution_plan: $json.execution_plan, markdown_plan: $json.markdown_plan }) }}
